children.name: Product defects

AssertionError: 
 Expected status code: 201, but got: 404. Response: {'fault': {'faultstring': 'Unable to identify proxy for host: internal-qa.api.service.nhs.uk:443 and url: /immunisation-fhir-api/FHIR/R4/Immunization', 'detail': {'errorcode': 'messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound'}}}
Verify that the POST Create API for different vaccine types
Verify that the POST Create API request with minimal dataset for different vaccine types
Verify that VACCINATION PROCEDURE TERM, VACCINE PRODUCT TERM fields are mapped to first instance of coding.display fields in imms delta table
Deleted event returns 404 on read request
Verify that the GET method of Search API will be successful with all the valid parameters
Flu event is created and updated twice and search request fetch the latest meta version and Etag

 Expected status code: 400, but got: 404. Response: {'fault': {'faultstring': 'Unable to identify proxy for host: internal-qa.api.service.nhs.uk:443 and url: /immunisation-fhir-api/FHIR/R4/Immunization', 'detail': {'errorcode': 'messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound'}}}

AssertionError: Expected status code 204, but got 404.  +  where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

Verify that Search API returns immunization events when searching by target-disease (POST)
